prompt:
Anatomical muscle-activation diagram of the "弹力带踝外翻" (banded ankle eversion) exercise, front view, focused on lower leg and foot. Person posture: Athletic person seated on the floor with the right leg extended straight forward. A loop resistance band is attached to a fixed anchor on the LEFT side at floor level, with the loop wrapped around the ball of the right foot. The right foot pulls OUTWARD (laterally) against the band's inward pull — this is the ANKLE EVERSION movement. The right ankle rotates so the sole of the foot turns to face slightly outward (away from the left foot), strengthening the peroneal muscles on the outside of the lower leg. Left leg is bent comfortably to the side. Plain black athletic shorts and gray tank top.. Body rendered with semi-transparent skin so underlying muscles are visible. Highlight in saturated red the primary working muscles: peroneal muscles (peroneus longus and brevis, outer side of the lower leg). Highlight in orange the secondary stabilizers: tibialis anterior and small intrinsic foot muscles. Other muscles in pale neutral gray. Add small clean labels with thin black arrow leader lines pointing from each label to its target muscle group. The labels MUST be in simplified Chinese characters using a clean sans-serif font. Use exactly the following labels: "腓骨长短肌" pointing to the peroneal muscles (outer lower leg); "胫骨前肌" pointing to the tibialis anterior (assisting); "足部稳定肌" pointing to the foot stabilizers. 

CRITICAL CONSTRAINTS — these are non-negotiable:
1. ALL TEXT IN THE IMAGE MUST BE SIMPLIFIED CHINESE CHARACTERS ONLY.
2. ABSOLUTELY NO ENGLISH WORDS, NO LATIN LETTERS, NO PINYIN ANYWHERE IN THE IMAGE.
3. NO romanization or transliteration of muscle names.
4. NO captions, NO subtitles, NO step-by-step text overlays.
5. ONLY the muscle labels listed above should appear as text.

Style: clean medical textbook illustration, off-white background, no facial features (head shape may be shown but no eyes/nose/mouth), anatomically accurate proportions, no shadows on background, no watermarks, no signature.
